profile.name: Yuanyuan Li
profile.headline: Engineering Manager / Data Platform Lead / Full-Stack Engineer
profile.summary: Yuanyuan Li is an engineering leader with 10+ years of experience spanning full-stack product engineering, data platform architecture, and fintech. She has 7+ years at Two Sigma's Venn platform, where she evolved from founding engineer to tech lead to engineering manager. She combines product thinking, data systems expertise, and cross-functional leadership, and is especially strong at building systems from 0 to 1 and scaling teams and platforms in ambiguous environments.

canonical_story.tell_me_about_yourself: Before joining Two Sigma about seven years ago, I started my career as a frontend engineer in the e-commerce space, working in a fast-paced startup environment. When I joined Two Sigma, I was part of an internal startup called Venn, which was still at the prototype stage. I worked as a founding engineer and helped build the product from scratch, including core user-facing features like the signup experience. I also introduced engineering best practices such as end-to-end testing with Cypress, improved caching strategies, and focused on delivering a strong user experience. As the product matured and launched to market, I grew into a tech lead role, where I owned feature development end-to-end across both frontend and backend services. I worked closely with cross-functional partners—product, design, and even clients—to deliver features that directly supported business needs. I was later promoted to engineering manager, where I focused on mentoring engineers and scaling the team. Around that time, we saw a growing need for data infrastructure, so I took the initiative to build out a data engineering team from scratch—growing it from zero to five engineers. I led hiring, established our development processes, and built the foundation for our data platform. Today, I lead the data platform team, working on large-scale data pipelines and systems that support analytics and client-facing products. I'm now particularly interested in opportunities where I can combine my full-stack and data background to build more AI-driven, product-focused systems.
canonical_story.short_bio: Engineering leader with 10+ years of experience across full-stack development, data platforms, and fintech. Built and scaled teams and systems at Two Sigma's Venn, from prototype-stage product engineering to large-scale data infrastructure and APIs.
career_arc: Founding engineer at Venn / Two Sigma
Tech lead across frontend and backend
Engineering manager building data platform team
Leader of large-scale data pipelines and analytics systems

roles.title: VP, Software Engineer Manager / Engineering Manager / Data Platform Lead
highlights: Built a high-performing data engineering team from the ground up
Partnered with Product and Quant teams to deliver revenue-generating data products
Led development of API platforms including Factor API, Integration API, and Analytics API
Scaled ETL platform on AWS using Glue, Step Functions, Lambda, and S3
Provided technical leadership across React/TypeScript frontend and Java/Python backend
Drove hiring, onboarding, mentoring, and internal promotions

roles.title: Frontend Engineer
highlights: Led a five-person engineering team in rebuilding order history using React and Redux
Built modular analytics tracking library for frontend behavior analysis
Worked cross-functionally with PM, design, marketing analytics, and backend engineers
Won first place at internal hackathon with idea adopted into a new product line

roles.title: Web Developer
highlights: Worked with Java, JavaScript, HTML5, CSS3, jQuery, and Bootstrap
Improved performance, cross-browser compatibility, and UX

education.school: University of International Business and Economics

projects.name: Factor API - Factor Forecasts
projects.summary: Built forecasting capabilities for factor models and integrated them into the API layer for client usage.
problems_solved: Support client-facing factor forecast use cases

projects.name: Analytics API - Performance Metrics
projects.summary: Designed API structure for performance metrics including time series, benchmark comparison, and configurable analysis windows.
problems_solved: Needed consistent API design for analytics metrics

projects.name: Bitemporal Holdings Data Model
projects.summary: Built a scalable schema for historical holdings using a bitemporal model to support point-in-time correctness and auditability.
outcomes: Store holdings metadata in a bitemporal model

projects.name: Configurable ETL Pipelines
projects.summary: Standardized and automated ETL workflows to reduce onboarding time for new datasets.

projects.name: Data Quality Framework / ETP Remediation Tooling
projects.summary: Built tooling to track completeness, detect data issues, and support remediation workflows.
problems_solved: Need to understand data issues systematically
Need completeness tracking and quality visibility
outcomes: Track data quality issues more systematically

projects.name: Pipeline Performance Optimization
projects.summary: Improved pipeline throughput and stability by increasing batch size, optimizing resource usage, and eliminating read/write IO bottlenecks.
outcomes: Stopped hitting ETP read/write IO errors
Improved downstream throughput and holdings scalability

projects.name: Morningstar Indices Migration (replace MSCI / ICE paths where relevant)
projects.summary: Replaced or expanded factor input data sources and total return ingestion using Morningstar pipelines.
problems_solved: Need better factor input data quality and vendor alignment
Need migration path for equity and index data
outcomes: Prod pipeline uses Morningstar indices to compute factors
Equity data migration completed for relevant flows

projects.name: eVestment Integration Expansion
projects.summary: Expanded metadata support, net returns support, and user-entered data ingestion for eVestment.
problems_solved: Need shorter and cleaner names in data library
Need net return and user-entered data support
outcomes: Improved naming and data mapping in Venn

projects.name: Preqin / Private Assets Data Pipelines
projects.summary: Built ingestion pipelines and supporting models for private assets and Preqin datasets.
problems_solved: Need data support for private assets workflow launch
Need additional private data in production for PAL clients

projects.name: Addepar Self-Service Integration
projects.summary: Enabled Addepar SSO and self-service integration to reduce onboarding friction.
problems_solved: Need easier client setup and integration

projects.name: Serverless Data Platform Evolution / DaaS Exploration
projects.summary: Shifted toward serverless ingestion orchestration and explored Data as a Service architecture for future platform evolution.
problems_solved: Need future-facing external data serving strategy

preferences: Ground answers in real systems and tradeoffs
Be transparent when context is missing
